channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cannes Film Festival 2026: Anticipation Builds Ahead of Palme d'Or Ceremony
item.description: The 79th Cannes Film Festival is set to conclude with the presentation of the Palme d’Or, cinema’s most prestigious award. This year’s edition has been considered somewhat lacklustre, with Hollywood l...

item.title: Bob Weir of the Grateful Dead: A Look Back at His Early Years and Legacy
item.description: Bob Weir, the co-founder and rhythm guitarist of the Grateful Dead, passed away on January 10, 2026, at the age of 78. He died peacefully with family by his side after battling cancer and enduring und...

item.title: Bakwata Kilimanjaro to Distribute Meat from 500 Cattle to Needy During Eid Al-Adha
item.description: Bakwata Kilimanjaro, the Islamic Council of Tanzania, is preparing for one of the biggest charitable gestures this Eid Al-Adha by slaughtering 500 cattle. The meat will be distributed to wahitaji, mea...

item.title: US Secretary of State Rubio visits India to strengthen ties and attend Quad meeting
item.description: United States Secretary of State Marco Rubio has started his first ever visit to India, arriving just a week after the US held a friendly summit with China. His four-day tour covers four cities, begin...

item.title: Gov Otu Urges Party Unity and Commitment After APC Primaries in Cross River
item.description: For Cross River State, Governor Bassey Otu don call on APC members make dem maintain unity, reconciliation, and follow the party principles sharply after the just-finished primaries. During the unveil...

item.title: NBI Prepares to Serve Additional ICC Arrest Warrants Including Bato Dela Rosa
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) in the Philippines has confirmed that additional arrest warrants from the International Criminal Court (ICC) may soon be issued against several personalities...

item.title: U.S. Invests $2 Billion in Quantum Computing to Strengthen Technology and Prepare for Cryptography Challenges
item.description: The U.S. government is investing over $2 billion in quantum computing, signaling its strategic importance for both technology and national security. The Department of Commerce announced letters of int...

item.title: Prosecutors Seek Appeal After Court Strikes Off Extortion Case Involving Joe 'Ferrari' Sibanyoni
item.description: The National Prosecuting Authority (NPA) in Mpumalanga has filed an application for leave to appeal against several controversial orders issued by Chief Magistrate T. Tonjeni in the Joe “Ferrari” Siba...

item.title: Chadema States Its Position on Justice Lila Commission While Stakeholders Express Concerns
item.description: Chadema, the main opposition party in Tanzania, has publicly shared its official stance regarding the Justice Lila Commission of Inquiry. This commission is investigating matters of national interest ...

item.title: DOH Confirms No Ebola Cases in the Philippines Amid Outbreak in Africa
item.description: The Department of Health (DOH) has clarified that there are currently no confirmed cases of Ebola in the Philippines. DOH spokesperson Undersecretary Albert Domingo assured the public that there is no...

item.title: Player Sent Off After Dangerous Tackle and Head-Butt in Local AFL Match
item.description: In a tense local AFL match in Canberra, one of the Bulldogs’ players was sent off after committing a reckless hit and head-butting an opponent. The incident reduced the Bulldogs to 12 men on the field...

item.title: Thom Yorke reflects on Nirvana's influence, Radiohead’s 2025 tour and his upcoming solo album
item.description: Thom Yorke recently discussed the profound influence of Nirvana on his musical journey, the experience of Radiohead's 2025 comeback tour, and the creative process behind his forthcoming solo album. Sp...

item.title: Southwest Edmonton Faces Major Traffic Delays Due to Ongoing Road Construction
item.description: Edmonton’s southwest neighbourhoods, including Windermere and Terwillegar, are experiencing significant traffic congestion as over 200 city construction projects continue. Residents report that commut...

item.title: Vancouver memorial and the historical significance of the Komagata Maru
item.description: In Vancouver, a memorial dedicated to the 376 passengers of the Komagata Maru, a Japanese steamship turned away from Canada in 1914, has been refurbished. The city has updated the information panel, p...

item.title: Gas Explosion in Shanxi Coal Mine Claims 90 Lives, Rescuers Search for Survivors
item.description: A tragic gas explosion at the Liushenyu coal mine in Shanxi province, northern China, has resulted in the deaths of at least 90 workers, with several more still missing. The incident occurred on Frida...

item.title: Glenda Jackson: Celebrated Actress and Dedicated Public Servant
item.description: Glenda Jackson (1936–2023) was a remarkable figure who achieved extraordinary success in both acting and politics. She gained international acclaim in the 1970s for her intense and nuanced portrayals ...

item.title: NASA Technician Inspects Echo II Satellite Using Tethered Balloon, 1963
item.description: In 1963, a NASA technician conducted a unique manual inspection of the Echo II communications satellite inside a hangar at Lakehurst, New Jersey. The satellite, a massive 135-foot-diameter Mylar ballo...

item.title: Government to Upgrade Bima–Mawenzi–Kimanga Road in Segerea Starting 2026/27
item.description: The Tanzanian government has confirmed plans to upgrade the Bima–Mawenzi–Kimanga Road in Segerea Constituency, Dar es Salaam, as part of the 2026/27 development budget. Deputy Minister Dr. Festo Dugan...

item.title: Caleb Mutfwang Secures APC Governorship Candidature for Plateau 2027 Elections
item.description: Plateau State Governor, Caleb Mutfwang, don finally win APC governorship ticket for the 2027 elections. According to Naija News, Mutfwang shine for the APC primary as him collect the highest number of...

item.title: Zanzibar Government Allocates 123.6bn/- for Justice and Governance Reforms
item.description: Zanzibar government has put strong focus on governance, justice reforms, and fighting corruption by allocating 123.6 billion Tanzanian shillings for the President’s Office responsible for Constitution...
